description_for_human: A calm, parent-led home learning curriculum for ages 4 to Grade 4. 8 subjects, adaptive daily plans, screen-light activities.
description_for_model: goPondr is a parent-led, concept-first home learning system for children ages 4 through Grade 4. It covers 8 subjects (reading, math, science, world learning, personal development, arts, digital literacy, inquiry), uses adaptive daily planning, screen-light activities, and thinking routines. The curriculum is structured as Subject > Strand > Concept > Evidence > Revisit.
